title: Solo Leveling Modpack | SoloCraft
description: The best modpack manwha/anime solo leveling.
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Rkfueyz7/images/a9cd1e42e5df3e9c58b6475989a7e1fd5a65aad3.png)

# Join [Discord](https://discord.gg/QfxWEKX3T7) and send you idea for modpack.

**Solo Leveling**: Arise in Minecraft
The Gates are opening... will you be the one to conquer them?
Transform your Minecraft world into a brutal RPG leveling system inspired by the legendary manhwa. Stop being a mere "gatherer" and start your journey toward becoming the Shadow Monarch.

**Key Features**:
- The System: Complete daily quests, gain XP, and distribute stat points into Strength, Agility, and Intelligence.
- Rank Up: Start from the pathetic E-Rank and fight your way up to National Level Hunter status.
- Shadow Extraction: Defeat powerful bosses and turn their souls into your loyal Shadow Soldiers. "Arise!"
- Instant Dungeons & Gates: Explore dangerous dimensions and C-Rank to S-Rank dungeons appearing across the world.
- Legendary Gear: Hunt for unique artifacts and weapons like Kasaka's Poison Fang.
- Can you survive the system, or will you remain a weakling forever?

# Overview

## This is a Unofficial Solo Leveling Manwha/Anime series modpack for minecraft.

- Better combat, new combat system.
- Too many relics and artifacts.
- New dungeons with NPCs
- Optimizetion
- Solo Leveling mod
